summary: Crystal‑clear audience tape captures an all‑out high‑energy show with a flawless “High Time” and a soaring “Cosmic Charlie.”
review: The recording is praised as a crystalline, sonically accurate audience source from June 19 1976, despite not containing the full concert. Fans rave about the performance – “High Time” is described as note‑perfect with beautiful harmonies and “Cosmic Charlie” blew everyone away, leaving no low point in the show.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave five stars, highlighting both an excellent performance and a high‑quality audience recording; minor note is that the tape is incomplete, keeping the rating just shy of perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as crystalline and sonically accurate; clear mix with good instrument separation, though the recording does not capture the entire concert.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note no low point; the set maintained high energy throughout with strong vocal harmonies and instrumental peaks.
